zh.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Greystoke是John Greystoke和Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers的兒子，於1406年9月9日出生在英國諾圖波藍德。他於1434年10月28日與Elizabeth II FitzHugh在英國英格蘭波藍德格斯托可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1487年在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年81歲，埋葬在英國越可爾吉可哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Greystoke是John Greystoke和Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers的儿子，于1406年9月9日出生在英国諾圖波藍德。他于1434年10月28日与Elizabeth II FitzHugh在英国英格兰波藍德格斯托可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1487年在英国諾薩普頓史爾享年81岁，埋葬在英国越可爾吉可哈姆。

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Greystoke was born on 9 September 1406, in Northumberland, England as the son of John Greystoke and Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. He married Elizabeth II FitzHugh on 28 October 1434, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1487, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Kirkham, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Greystoke est né le 9 septembre 1406, à Northumberland, Angleterre, fils de John Greystoke et Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. Il a épousé Elizabeth II FitzHugh le 28 octobre 1434, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1487, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Kirkham, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Greystoke wurde am 9. September 1406 in Northumberland, England, als Sohn von John Greystoke und Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers geboren. Er hat am 28. Oktober 1434 in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth II FitzHugh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1487 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Kirkham, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Greystoke è nato il il 9 settembre 1406 nel Northumberland, England come figlio di John Greystoke e Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. Lui sposato Elizabeth II FitzHugh il 28 ottobre 1434, nel Greystoke, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1487, nel Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Kirkham, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Greystokeは1406年9月9日にイギリスノースウンバーランドでJohn GreystokeとLady Elizabeth de Ferrersの息子として生まれた。1434年10月28日にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクでElizabeth II FitzHughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1487年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで81歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアキルクハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Greystoke(은)는 1406년 9월 9일 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 John Greystoke(와)과 Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1434년 10월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 그리스토크에서 Elizabeth II FitzHugh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1487년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 커카에 묻혔다.

mn.Chillingham, Northumberland, England, Un: Chillingham, Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Greystoke nasceu em 9 de setembro de 1406, em Northumberland, Inglaterra filho de John Greystoke e Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth II FitzHugh em 28 de outubro de 1434, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1487, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Kirkham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Greystoke родился 9 сентября 1406 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. Его родителей звали John Greystoke и Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth II FitzHugh 28 октября 1434 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1487 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности кирхам, еркшир, Англия.

sm.from 1436 to 1487: mai le 1436 e o'o I le 1487

es.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Greystoke nació el 9 de septiembre de 1406, en Northumberland, Inglaterra como hijo de John Greystoke y Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. Se casó con Elizabeth II FitzHugh el 28 de octubre de 1434, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1487, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Kirkham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
